n: The Path to the Flaming Spire

steps.t: The hidden gate of Lûghash can be found in an alcove high above the main gate, accessible by a rear pathway leading onto the Spire. Spakorth has descr…
The hidden gate of Lûghash can be found in an alcove high above the main gate, accessible by a rear pathway leading onto the Spire. You have discovere…
Spakorth can be found in the dwarf-barracks on the central level of Lûghash. You have entered Lûghash and should now speak to Spakorth.
